Pre-sale Price

= 1 ETH

Airdrop Pre-sale

About KernelDAO (KERNEL)

Restaking, reimagined!. Leading restaking protocol with three key products Kernel (Restaking on BNB Chain),Kelp Liquid Restaking (rsETH), Gain (Automated rewards farming).

KernelDAO is the governance token of KERNEL, with a total issuance of 1,000,000,000. It is intended to create a high-priced coin to attract popularity! 5% of KERNEL tokens for community airdrop, and distributed to community users for free. 10% of KERNEL tokens for pre-sale, and the pre-sale price is 1 ETH = 150,000 KERNEL. After the pre-sale ends, KERNEL will be listed on exchanges such as Binance, Huobi and Coinbase. The estimated listing price of KERNEL is $1.

Smart Contract

  • Token Symbol KernelDAO (KERNEL)
  • Contract Address 0xe5c435050cfe347ed799f9cc6b8dc6847f8b8516
  • Decimals 18
  • Total Supply 1,000,000,000
  • Blockchain Ethereum
Whitepaper
  • Support

    • Pre-sale is Live

    Pre-sale supply: 100,000,000

    Pre-sale address: 0x44012ee5669eedcf21b483ccd7a5d2a710a4f7ef

    Pre-sale price: 1 ETH = 150,000 KERNEL

    Use your wallet to send ETH, BNB, USDT or USDC to the Pre-sale address. Our system will send KERNEL tokens to your wallet instantly.

    The minimum purchase is 0.05 ETH, and the maximum purchase is 50 ETH.

    Airdrop

  • Support

    • Introduce

    Community airdrop
    • ● Quantity: Quantity: 40,000,000 KERNEL (4%)
    • ● Airdrop rules: KERNEL will start community airdrop at 20:30 (UTC) on April 1st, 2025, and the airdrop time is 20 days. Community users can participate in the airdrop by submitting the ETH wallet address on the KERNEL website. The initial amount of each address is 200 KERNEL. The airdrop is completely free, and the airdrop rewards will be distributed to the submitted address after the airdrop is over. Airdrop participation addresses are estimated to be 1,000,000. If the total airdrop award exceeds the quantity for airdrop, the airdrop event will end early. If there are still unclaimed KERNEL tokens after the airdrop ends, the unclaimed tokens will be permanently burned.
    • ● Invitation rules: Users can get additional KERNEL token rewards by inviting friends to participate in the airdrop. You can get 20 KERNEL tokens for each friend you invite. You can invite up to 500 friends, and get up to 10000 KERNEL tokens. The quantity for airdrop is limited, and KERNEL issuance is small. The estimated price of KERNEL is $1. Hurry up and share it with your friends.
    Pre-sale
    • ● Pre-sale quantity: 100,000,000 KERNEL (10%)
    • ● Pre-sale price: 1 ETH = 150,000 KERNEL. The minimum purchase is 0.05 ETH, and the maximum purchase is 50 ETH (the pre-sale quantity is limited, and the excess ETH will be automatically returned).
    • ● Pre-sale rules: The system will start the pre-sale at 20:30 (UTC) on April 1st, 2025, and the pre-sale time is 20 days. Use your wallet to send ETH to the pre-sale address, and the system will immediately send the corresponding amount of KERNEL tokens to your wallet. The quantity of KERNEL tokens for pre-sale is limited, and the quota is sorted according to the arrival time of ETH. First come first served.
    • ● Once the pre-sale is over. 50% of the funds raised will be used for listing on Binance, Huobi and Coinbase. The other 50% of the funds raised will be used to buyback KERNEL tokens. This action will prevent people from dumping.
    KernelDAO (KERNEL)Tokenomics
    • ● Total supply: 1,000,000,000 KERNEL
    • ● Community airdrop: 40,000,000 KERNEL (4%)
    • ● Pre-sale: 100,000,000 KERNEL (10%)
    • ● Project Partners: 10,000,000 KERNEL (1%)
    • ● Liquidity, Future developments: 20,000,000 KERNEL (2%)

    Roadmap

    Phase 1
    March 2025

    √ Official website launched & smart contract deployed

    √ Social media sites (twitter, telegram, etc.) launched

    √ Pre-sale & airdrop started

    Phase 2
    April 2025

    > Pre-sale completed

    > Airdrop distribution completed

    > KERNEL listed on binance, huobi and coinbase exchanges

    > Second KERNEL marketing campaign

    Phase 3
    May 2025

    > KERNEL platform launched

    > Launch swap platform, staking program and liquidity pool

    > Start third large-scale marketing

    Phase 4
    Mid-2025

    > Become the Largest, Lowest rate, and most comprehensive cross-blockchain Exchange

    > Launch of mobile apps and DEFI wallet

    > More functions, more activities in planning
